chunks.text: Technical Reports - Ming C. Wu. Integrated Optical MEMS for Scalable Trapped Ion Quantum Computing (EECS-2025-19) by Daniel Klawson and Ming C. Wu. 2D-3D Photonics for Scalable Quantum Computing by Daniel Klawson. Wearable, User-Centric Sweat Sensing Platforms with Scalable Fabrication by Noelle Davis. Large-Scale Silicon Photonic Switches with Sub-Microsecond Switching Time by Johannes Henriksson. Hybrid Convolutional Optoelectronic Reservoir Computing for Image Recognition (EECS-2021-251) by Philip Jacobson, Mizuki Shirao, Kerry Yu, Guan-Lin Su and Ming C. Wu.
chunks.question: What are some recent technical reports from Ming C. Wu's group?
chunks.answer: Quantum computing, photonics, and wearable sensing reports.

chunks.text: Ultrasound Detection with Silicon Microring Resonators (EECS-2021-123) by Sarika Madhvapathy. Low Noise, Low Power Cavity Optomechanical Oscillators (EECS-2016-180) by Alejandro Grine. Optofluidic Devices for Droplet and Cell Manipulation (EECS-2015-119) by Shao Ning Pei. Capstone Report Project NoScope (EECS-2015-53) by Longxiang Cui, Mark Hardiman, Zeyi Lee, Ying Ou and Ryan Frazier. Capstone Report - Project NoScope (EECS-2015-52) by Zeyi Lee, Mark Hardiman, Ryan Frazier, Ying Ou and Longxiang Cui.
chunks.question: What types of devices and projects are listed in these reports?
chunks.answer: Ultrasound detection, oscillators, microfluidics, and capstone projects.

chunks.text: Project NoScope (EECS-2015-51) by Mark Hardiman, Ying Ou, Ryan Frazier, Zeyi Lee and Longxiang Cui. Capstone Report Project NoScope (EECS-2015-50) by Ryan Frazier, Ying Ou, Mark Hardiman, Zeyi Lee and Longxiang Cui. Metal-optic and Plasmonic Semiconductor-based Nanolasers (EECS-2012-62) by Amit Lakhani. Light-Actuated Digital Microfluidics for Large-Scale Droplet Manipulation (EECS-2011-124) by Shao Ning Pei and Ming C. Wu. Light-induced Electrokinetics: A path to a versatile micro total analysis system (EECS-2011-34) by Justin K Valley.
chunks.question: What are some older technical reports from this collection?

chunks.text: Frequency-Modulated Microwave Photonic Links with Direct Detection: Review and Theory (EECS-2010-156) by John Wyrwas. Optoelectronic Manipulation, Assembly, and Patterning of Nanoparticles (EECS-2009-165) by Arash Jamshidi and Ming C. Wu. Semiconductor Nanowire Manipulation Using Optoelectronic Tweezers (EECS-2006-116) by Arash Jamshidi, Peter Pauzauskie, Aaron Takami Ohta, Pei-Yu Chiou, Hsan-yin Hsu, Peidong Yang and Ming C. Wu.
chunks.question: What topics do the earliest reports in this list cover?
chunks.answer: Microwave photonics and nanoparticle manipulation techniques.
